1000617209.english: Haa... haa... Thank goodness I caught up with you before you went in there...
1000617209.korean: 하아… 하아… 다행이에요. 저기 들어가기 전에 따라잡아서…

1000617210.english: Huh? Daphne? Why are you here?

1000617211.english: Oh my? A quiet stalker is here?

1000617212.english: What are you doing here? I thought you were hanging out with your old sister?
1000617212.korean: 여긴 왠 일이죠? 당신의 늙은 언니와 놀고 있을 줄 알았더니?

1000617213.english: You can't go in front of me, Sister. Miss Lilith.
1000617213.korean: 저 앞은 들어가면 안 돼요. 언니. 리리스 양.

1000617214.english: No way… Are you trying to become a pest too? Trying to interfere with the chocolate making for your master?
1000617214.korean: 설마… 너도 해충이 되려는 거야? 주인님한테 줄 초콜릿 만들기를 방해하려고?

1000617215.english: That's not it. Seriously... Sister, there are a lot of Metal Parasites in front of me. &n It's a place that the old Bioroids called Desport...
1000617215.korean: 그런 게 아니에요. 정말… 언니, 저 앞엔 철충들이 잔뜩 있어요. &n옛날 바이오로이드들이 데스포트라고 부르는 곳이라고…

1000617216.english: Huh. What were you talking about… Really… I overheard you for nothing.
1000617216.korean: 훗. 무슨 이야길 하나 했더니… 정말… 괜히 들었네요.

1000617217.english: I'm sorry. I don't want to take this pest's side... but this time, I can't help it.
1000617217.korean: 미안해. 이 해충 편을 들어주고 싶진 않은데… 이번은 어쩔 수 없어.

1000617218.english: Because no one can interfere with my Giant Heart Blood Chocolate for my master.
1000617218.korean: 누구도 주인님을 위한 내 자이언트 하트 블러드 초콜릿을 방해할 순 없으니까.

1000617219.english: Haha. Well said, stalker. I agree with you this time.
1000617219.korean: 훗. 말 잘했어. 스토커. 이번은 같은 생각이야.

1000617220.english: To make my 5:1 life-size Lilith nude chocolate, I need that giant crusher right there in there.
1000617220.korean: 내 5:1 등신대 리리스 누드 초콜릿을 만드려면 저기 저 안에 있는 거대 분쇄기가 필요하다고.

1000617221.english: That Lilith? 1:5 chocolate... That's about 30-40 centimeters... Do you really need that much cacao?
1000617221.korean: 저 리리스 양? 1:5 초콜릿이면… 30~40센티미터 정도인데… &n그렇게 많은 카카오가 필요한가요?

1000617222.english: What are you talking about? I said 5:1? Hehe...

1000617223.english: What... You're going to make chocolate bars over eight meters long? Sister, really? You mean giant chocolate bars...
1000617223.korean: 무슨… 8미터가 넘는 초콜릿을 만들겠다고요? 언니, 설마? 자이언트 초콜릿이란 말이…

1000617224.english: …If I make something too small…the master will think my love is smaller than Lilith…and be disappointed…
1000617224.korean: … 너무 작은 걸 만들면… 주인님께서 내 사랑이 리리스보다 작은 줄 알고… 실망하실 테니…

1000617225.english: Master loves me the most, so he'll definitely be disappointed. Don't worry. Haa... Master... I'll put all the love in my heart into it... Please wait... Hehe.
1000617225.korean: 주인님은 날 제일 사랑하시니 분명히 실망하실 거야. 걱정 마세요. 하아… 주인님… 제가 심장 안에 있는 모든 사랑을 넣어 드릴게요… 기다려 주세요… 히힛.

1000617226.english: Isn't there blood in your heart, not love?
1000617226.korean: 네 심장 안엔 사랑이 아니라 피가 들어 있는 거 아냐?

1000617227.english: No way… Stalker you… You said it was blood chocolate.
1000617227.korean: 설마… 스토커 너… 블러드 초콜릿이라고 하더니.

1000617228.english: Hehehe... Pest... You couldn't even imagine, right? For the sake of the master... A few liters or so...
1000617228.korean: 히히… 해충… 넌 상상도 못할 걸? 주인님을 위해서라면… 몇 리터 쯤은…

1000617229.english: No! You'll die! Even the master would be uncomfortable with something so big like chocolate or blood.
1000617229.korean: 안 돼요! 죽습니다! 주인님도 그렇게 큰 초콜릿이나 피를 넣은 건 부담스러워하실 거예요.

1000617230.english: It would be better to ask Miss Sowan or Miss Aurora to make you some high-quality chocolate, even if it's small...
1000617230.korean: 차라리 소완 양이나 아우로라 양에게 부탁해 작더라도 고급 초콜릿을 만드는 게…

1000617232.english: Yes? Why all of a sudden…

1000617233.english: I've thought about it a lot. No matter how hard we try, we can't be like those pests.
1000617233.korean: 나도 생각을 충분히 했어. 우리가… 아무리 노력해도… 그 해충들처럼은 못해.

1000617234.english: They may win in looks and physique, but of course, they also receive love from their masters. But they can't compete with those pests in terms of taste. And in terms of quality...
1000617234.korean: 외모나… 몸매는 이기지만… 물론 주인님께 받는 사랑도… 하지만 맛은 그 해충들한테 못 이겨. 퀄리티로는...

1000617235.english: Stalker, you said you've been thinking a lot... Your mind, which was once cloudy, has become quite clear? That's right.
1000617235.korean: 스토커, 생각을 많이 했다고 하더니… 흐릿하던 머리가 꽤나 명쾌해 졌네? 맞아.

1000617236.english: If there's a problem with quality... wouldn't it be natural to compete with quantity?
1000617236.korean: 퀄리티에 문제가 생기면… 퀀티티로 승부를 보는 게 당연한 거 아니겠어?

1000617237.english: No matter what... and the two of you were always together and then suddenly... when did you kill me like that...
1000617237.korean: 아무리 그래도… 게다가 두 분 붙어 다니시더니 갑자기… 언제 그렇게 죽이...

1000617238.english: Hah. It's too late. A stalker who pretends to be innocent and innocent.
1000617238.korean: 훗. 이미 늦었어. 얌전한 척하는 청순비치 스토커.

1000617239.english: If you keep bothering us... I'll tell your sisters about it.
1000617239.korean: 자꾸 우리를 방해하면… 그 이야기를 너희 언니들에게 해 버릴 거야.

1000617241.english: The quiet cat is my little brother… but a beach pretending to be innocent has gone up to the hut?
1000617241.korean: 얌전한 고양이는 내 동생인데… 부뚜막엔 청순한 척 하는 비치가 올라가 버렸네?

1000617242.english: Uh… how did you do that…

1000617243.english: So there was a reason her breasts were so big? In that way…
1000617243.korean: 가슴이 큰 이유가 있긴 있었구나? 그런 방식으로…

1000617244.english: I was just going to kill you, but... Master was so happy... I thought you'd be useful as a talisman, so I kept you alive. Don't make me regret it.
1000617244.korean: 그냥 죽이려고 했는데… 주인님께서 너무 즐거워하셔서… 노리개론 쓸만하다 싶어 살려둔 거야. 후회하게 하지 말아줘?

1000617246.english: What are you talking about? Pests? A hut?

1000617249.english: Huh? Daphne? Will you help me? As expected from my sister!
1000617249.korean: 응? 다프네? 도와줄 거야? 역시 내 동생!

1000617250.english: Oh, I have to help you, sister.

1000617251.english: Hmph. Well, then let's go. For chocolate that will express my immense love and beautiful body.
1000617251.korean: 훗. 자, 그럼 출발하지. 내 거대한 사랑과 아름다운 몸매를 표현할 초콜릿을 위해.

1000617252.english: This time... even Master will have no choice but to confess his hidden love to me! Haa...
1000617252.korean: 이번엔… 주인님도 숨겨왔던 사랑을 내게 고백할 수 밖에 없을 거야! 하아...

1000617253.english: …I'm sorry. I didn't know anyone would see that…
1000617253.korean: … 죄송해요. 그 일을 누가 봤을 줄은…

1000617254.english: - Daphne was crying as she talked about what had happened.
1000617254.korean: - 그 동안 있었던 일에 대해 이야기하며 다프네는 울상을 짓고 있었다.

1000617255.english: - That time... I was so careful... Why did I get caught again? And... Lilith saw it... It's even more unsettling.
1000617255.korean: - 그때 일은… 그렇게 조심을 했었는데… 어째서 또 들킨 걸까? 게다가… 그 일을 리리스가 봤다니… 더욱 마음이 어지럽다.

1000617256.english: - But… in the end, this kind of thing can't be avoided. It's my responsibility.
1000617256.korean: - 하지만… 결국 이런 일은 피해선 안된다. 내가 책임질 일이니까.

1000617258.english: Master? Master? Hehe... Could it be, you've been missing Lilith? As expected... Are you starting to get tired of your slaves?
1000617258.korean: 주인님? 주인님? 후후… 설마, 리리스가 그리워지신 건가요? 역시나… 이젠 슬슬 노리개들에게 질리신 건가요?

1000617259.english: "What does Norigae mean?" I can't understand everything. Anyway, I'll have to calm Lilith down.
1000617259.korean: - 노리개는 또 무슨 말일까? 모두 다 이해할 수는 없다. 어쨌든 리리스를 조용히 달래야겠지.

1000617260.english: - I quietly asked Lilith about aiming for the scraper.
1000617260.korean: - 난 조용히 리리스에게 스크래퍼를 노리는 것에 대해 물었다.

1000617261.english: - At first, Lilith tried to avoid revealing the reason for her departure, making excuses, but eventually she had no choice but to confess everything.
1000617261.korean: - 리리스는 처음에는 이런저런 핑계를 대며 가는 이유를 밝히지 않으려 했지만 결국은 모든 걸 털어놓을 수 밖에 없었다.

1000617262.english: Oh... Master... Lilith always wants to be a lovable and new Lilith to you... but I ruined it all.
1000617262.korean: 흑… 주인님… 리리스는 주인님껜 늘 사랑스럽고 늘 새로운 리리스이고 싶은데… 모두 망치고 말았어요.

1000617263.english: But… I was going to surprise my master with a nice chocolate statue…
1000617263.korean: 하지만… 멋진 초콜릿 조각상으로 주인님을 깜짝 놀라게 만들려고 했는데…

1000617265.english: Shut up… If it weren't for Master… I would have shown you what a truly evil release is. And to reveal that to Master…
1000617265.korean: 시끄러워… 주인님 앞이 아니라면… 난 정말 나쁜 리리스가 뭔지 보여줬을 테니까. 그걸 주인님께 밝히다니…

1000617266.english: But… it was too dangerous to go there.
1000617266.korean: 하지만… 거길 가는 건 너무 위험했어요.

1000617267.english: - It seems like Lilith is really upset. It's probably best to calm her down a bit here.
1000617267.korean: - 아무래도 리리스가 단단히 삐친 것 같다. 역시 여긴… 마음을 좀 달래주는 게 좋겠지.

1000617268.english: …I won't be able to surprise the master… but still… this time…
1000617268.korean: … 주인님을 깜짝 놀라게 하진 못하겠지만… 그래도… 이번엔…

1000617270.english: Master… The kind Lilith… will truly surprise you, Master. Really…
1000617270.korean: 주인님… 착한 리리스가… 주인님을 정말로 깜짝 놀라게 해드리겠어요. 정말로…

1000617271.english: - There's no other way. After all... I feel uneasy about leaving it to Lilith and Lise alone. &n I have no choice but to help you win this battle.
1000617271.korean: - 이 방법 밖엔 없다. 아무래도… 리리스와 리제에게만 맡겨놓긴 불안하니까. &n내가 이 전투를 이기게 해줄 수 밖에.

1000617272.english: Master… I want to do everything for you with the power of Lilith…
1000617272.korean: 주인님… 주인님껜 리리스의 힘으로 모든 걸 해드리고 싶은데…

1000617273.english: Of course! Master, I'll prepare it right away.

1000617274.english: ...Master, you've changed a lot. Before... you weren't able to handle Miss Lilith this well...
1000617274.korean: … 주인님, 많이 변하셨네요. 예전엔… 이 정도로 리리스 양을 잘 다루진 못하셨는데...

1000617275.korean: - 난 그냥 웃을 수 밖에 없었다.

1000617276.english: - Well, it's true that I don't feel burdened by releases or releases like I used to. It's also a problem I have to solve.
1000617276.korean: - 뭐, 예전처럼 리리스나 리제가 부담스럽진 않은 게 사실이니까. 내가 해결할 문제이기도 하고.

1000617277.english: - Before that, we need to prepare for battle. It's going to be a difficult battle, so we need to prepare carefully.
1000617277.korean: - 그것보단 우선 전투를 준비해야 한다. 어려운 전투니 신중하게 준비를 해야겠지.

1000617278.english: Heh, did you get it done?

1000617280.english: Well, shall we go find the grinder now? Master, please wait! Lilith will surprise you with the best chocolate.
1000617280.korean: 뭐, 이제 슬슬 분쇄기를 찾으러 가볼까? 주인님, 기다려 주세요! 리리스가 최고의 초콜릿으로 놀라게 해드릴게요.

1000617282.english: Huh? Why all of a sudden!

1000617283.english: Ugh! Of all people... Damn it...

1000617288.english: What happened? Could it be… a stalker… you? Did you save me?
1000617288.korean: 어떻게 된 거야? 설마… 스토커… 네가? 날 구한 거야?

1000617289.english: Huh... pests... I can't even avoid that... like an idiot...
1000617289.korean: 흥… 해충… 그런 것도 못 피해서… 바보같이...

1000617291.english: …the chocolate recipe is in your tablet.
1000617291.korean: … 초콜릿 레시피는 네 태블릿 안에 있으니까.

1000617292.english: …I won't say thank you. I won't let you stalk your master.
1000617292.korean: … 고맙단 말을 하진 않을 거야. 네가 주인님께 스토킹을 하는 걸 봐주지도 않을 거고.

1000617293.english: Pests… Let's make you feel like you've been reborn and become beneficial insects.
1000617293.korean: 해충… 너나 새롭게 태어난 기분으로 익충이 되도록 해.

1000617294.english: Hmm. Well... I guess it'll be fine. Oh, over there...
1000617294.korean: 흥. 뭐… 아무래도 좋겠지. 아 저기…

1000617296.english: The annoying cat pest is coming.

1000617297.english: If I get caught… I'll just nag you and tell you to find some information, right?
1000617297.korean: 잡히면… 잔소리를 하고 자료나 찾으란 소릴 하겠지?

1000617299.english: Yes… and the 5:1 ratio release nude chocolate that will kill the master.
1000617299.korean: 그래… 그리고 주인님을 뇌살시킬 5대1 비율 리리스 누드 초콜릿이지.

1000617300.english: Crusher... Blood... Beautifully shaped like my heart...
1000617300.korean: 분쇄기… 피… 내 심장 모양으로 아름답게...

1000617301.english: Let's go quickly. It's data... The other kids will find it. There's no need for us to get involved.
1000617301.korean: 얼른 가자. 자료야… 다른 애들이 찾겠지. 우리까지 낄 필요는 없을 거야.

1000617303.english: By the way, stalker, did you hear about your sister's betrayal?
1000617303.korean: 그런데 스토커, 너희 언니가 배신한 이야긴 들었어?

1000617305.english: How about it? Leaving that old sister behind and starting anew with the Companions... Of course, I'm below Hachiko and Fenrir in terms of rank. I think I might give it a go, given my current mood...
1000617305.korean: 어때? 그 늙은 언니를 버리고 컴패니언에서 새출발하는게… 물론 서열은 하치코랑 펜리르 밑이야. 지금 기분이라면 허락해줄 수 있을 것 같은데...

1000617307.english: I'm different from you. I'm the wife, but... I can forgive a concubine. And only if they're companion sisters...
1000617307.korean: 난 너랑 달라. 본처는 나지만… 첩 정도는 용서해 줄 수 있어. 그것도 컴패니언 자매들만이지만...

1000617308.english: Pest… Master, you are mine. From hair to toe…
1000617308.korean: 해충… 주인님은 내 꺼야. 머리카락부터 발톱 끝까지…

1000617309.english: Hmph. Well? Well, think about it slowly. Don't cry later when your master is taken away.
1000617309.korean: 훗. 글쎄? 뭐, 천천히 생각해 보라고. 나중에 주인님을 빼앗기고 울지 말고.

1000617310.english: Today... no, I think it's going to be a good release until today.
1000617310.korean: 오늘은… 아니 오늘까진 착한 리리스가 될 것 같으니 말야.

1000617311.english: Welcome to the theme park that will make your dreams come true!
1000617311.korean: 여러분의 꿈을 이루어드리는 테마 파크에 어서오세요~

1000617314.english: Hohoho, what a cute little human. You didn't come alone, did you?
1000617314.korean: 우후후, 귀여운 꼬마 인간님이네요. 혹시 혼자서 오신 건 아니겠죠?

1000617315.english: No, I came with my dad.

1000617316.english: I heard there's a really fun ride there!

1000617317.english: Oh, really? I see you've come to Area A.

1000617318.english: Before we start the real tour... Here, I'll give you some churros.
1000617318.korean: 본격적인 투어를 시작하기 전에... 자, 여기 츄러스를 드릴게요.

1000617320.english: Yes, Sister. What's in that A section?
1000617320.korean: 있지, 언니. 그 A구역엔 뭐가 있어?

1000617321.english: Haha, everything you're looking for will be there, little human.
1000617321.korean: 후후, 꼬마 인간님이 기대하는 모든게 있을 거예요.

1000617322.english: Carousels, haunted houses, snack houses, Ferris wheels, roller courses... Oh, no.
1000617322.korean: 회전 목마, 유령의 집, 간식이 가득한 집, 관람차, 롤러 코스... 아, 이건 안되겠어요.

1000617323.english: There's also a fortune teller's shop. If you come and ask me later, I'll tell you my fortune.
1000617323.korean: 점술 가게도 있는데, 이따 오셔서 저를 찾으시면 점을 봐드릴게요.

1000617324.english: If I find my sister? What's my sister's name?

1000617326.english: Yeah, I’ll definitely come visit. Thanks!

1000617328.english: Daughter, what did Dad say we should do with Bioroids?
1000617328.korean: 딸. 아빠가 바이오로이드는 어떻게 대해야 한다고 했지?

1000617330.english: I told you not to greet or thank Bioroid.
1000617330.korean: 바이오로이드한테는 인사하거나 고맙다고 하는 거 아니라고 말했잖니.

1000617331.english: But... the pretty girl gave me churros...

1000617333.english: Our daughter will grow up to be a great person, so we should know better.
1000617333.korean: 우리 딸은 나중에 훌륭한 사람이 될 거니까, 더 잘 알고 있어야해.

1000617335.english: My princess, why don't you sit over there and eat some churros? Daddy's going to talk to a friend.
1000617335.korean: 우리 공주님, 저기 잠깐 앉아서 츄러스 먹고 있을까? 아빠는 친구랑 얘기좀 할게.

1000617336.english: Oh, right. Area A later? Can we play there?
1000617336.korean: 아, 맞다. 이따가 A구역? 거기서 놀 수 있는거지?

1000617337.english: Of course. I'll take you there after I finish talking with my dad's friend.
1000617337.korean: 당연하지. 아빠 친구랑 얘기 끝나면 데려다줄게.

1000617338.english: There will be a lot of our daughter's friends there, so she can have fun while you and your friends do your business.
1000617338.korean: 거기엔 우리 딸 친구들도 많을 거니까, 아빠랑 아빠 친구랑 볼일 보는 동안 재밌게 놀면 돼.

1000617341.english: Oh, the parking lot was packed.

1000617342.english: Oh, right. I heard something good came into Area C today?
1000617342.korean: 아, 그래. 오늘 C구역에 괜찮은 거 하나 들어온댔지?

1000617343.english: What happened? Did that Labiata come?
1000617343.korean: 뭐가 들어왔길래 그래? 그 라비아타라도 왔나?

1000617344.english: How could that be? Something that expensive.

1000617345.english: Even if that were the case, I would send it to a place used by high-ranking officials, not a remote park like this.
1000617345.korean: 만약 그렇다고 해도 이런 변두리 파크가 아니라 높으신 분들 이용하는 곳에다 보내겠지.

1000617348.english: The original manufacturer had given advance notice, but since there wasn't any this time, it seems like they've prepared something great.
1000617348.korean: 원래 제조사는 미리 알려줬었는데 이번에는 그런 것도 없는 걸 보면 뭔가 대단한 걸 준비하긴 했나봐.

1000617350.english: Look at that kid's face flushed.

1000617351.english: Go ahead and get a seat. I'll take our princess to Area A...
1000617351.korean: 먼저 가서 자리좀 잡고 있어. 나는 우리 공주님 좀 A구역에 데려다주고...

1000617352.english: Are you planning to stop by Area B again?

1000617353.english: Didn't you buy one before? Didn't it feel cool?
1000617353.korean: 전에 하나 사지 않았냐? 시원치 않은가봐?

1000617354.english: Mr. Ha... Don't be ridiculous. I received a completely defective product.
1000617354.korean: 하 씨... 말도 마라. 완전 불량품이 왔어.

1000617355.english: It broke down in less than a week.

1000617356.english: You should use it sparingly. If you use it according to your taste, it's natural that it will turn out like that.
1000617356.korean: 그러게 좀 아껴서 쓰던가. 네 취향에 막 쓰면 그렇게 되는게 당연하지.

1000617357.english: Okay, I'm going to have some fun, so grab a good seat.
1000617357.korean: 됐고, 재미좀 보다 갈테니까 좋은 자리 잡고 있어.

1000617359.english: You're such a doting daughter, you doting daughter.

1000617360.english: You too, try having a pretty daughter like that. Can't you be like me?
1000617360.korean: 너도 저렇게 예쁜 딸 낳아봐라. 나처럼 안되나.

1000617361.english: You there. Do you see the ticket here? Bring me some popcorn or something for my daughter.
1000617361.korean: 거기 너. 여기 이용권 보이지? 우리 딸 먹게 팝콘 같은 것 좀 가져와봐.

1000617364.english: Yeah, our princess, have fun too. Call me if anything happens.
1000617364.korean: 그래. 우리 공주님도 재밌게 놀아. 무슨 일 있으면 전화하고.

1000617365.english: Hi? Are you here with your dad too?

1000617367.english: Yes, sir. Is there anything else you need?
1000617367.korean: 네, 손님~ 더 필요한 게 있으신가요?

1000617368.english: It seems to be better than I thought. Follow me to Area B.
1000617368.korean: 생각보다 괜찮을 것 같군. B구역으로 따라와라.

1000617369.english: Ahaha... Sir, I'm in charge of guidance and fortune telling attractions in Area A...
1000617369.korean: 아하하... 손님, 저는 안내와 A구역의 점술 어트랙션을 담당하는...

1000617374.english: Although it is insufficient, I am in charge of managing this park.
1000617374.korean: 부족하지만 이 파크의 관리를 맡고 있습니다.

1000617375.english: Did our Bioroid commit any offense?

1000617376.english: Yes, this doesn't resist the Bioroid theme.
1000617376.korean: 그래요. 이게 바이오로이드 주제에 저항하지 않습니까.

1000617377.english: Not here either, I was trying to take you to Area B properly.
1000617377.korean: 여기서도 아니고 제대로 B구역으로 데려가려고 했다구요.

1000617379.english: Oh... I'm sorry to the customer, but this Circe model is in charge of Area A...
1000617379.korean: 저런... 손님께는 죄송하지만, 이 키르케 모델은 A구역을 담당하는...

1000617380.english: I heard that from him too.

1000617382.english: Our park's Bioroids are not allowed to leave their assigned areas and duties.
1000617382.korean: 저희 파크의 바이오로이드는 담당 구역과 업무를 벗어날 수 없게 되어있습니다.

1000617385.english: If you're willing to pay a bit of an extra fee, I'd be happy to help.
1000617385.korean: 다소의... 추가 요금을 지불할 용의가 있으시다면, 안내해드리겠습니다.

1000617386.english: It's an honor to have the manager personally guide me through this.

1000617387.english: No, I'm sorry I didn't recognize you, a regular customer.
1000617387.korean: 아닙니다. 손님같은 단골을 미처 알아보지 못해 죄송할 따름입니다.

1000617388.english: But if you come here so often, you must have seen our park usage guide...
1000617388.korean: 그래도 이렇게 자주 오셨으면 저희 파크 이용 안내를 보셨을텐데...

1000617389.english: Haha, I'm not the type of person to see things like that...
1000617389.korean: 하핫, 그런 건 잘 안보는 성격이라...

1000617390.english: I should've done this a long time ago. Aren't there a lot of good places outside of Area B?
1000617390.korean: 진즉 이럴 걸 그랬군요. B구역 말고도 밖에 괜찮은 게 많던데요?

1000617391.english: Our park strives to provide our guests with every possible service.
1000617391.korean: 저희 파크는 손님에게 가능한한 모든 서비스를 제공하려 노력하고 있습니다.

1000617392.english: Please continue to use our services.

1000617394.english: Oh, today we've added some special options. Check out what's prepared in that small room over there.
1000617394.korean: 아, 오늘은 특별히 추가 옵션들을 적용해 두었습니다. 저쪽, 작은 방에 준비된 것들을 확인해보세요.

1000617395.english: Oh, this... I don't have to go to Area C...

1000617397.english: Well then, have a good time.

1000617399.english: What, what is that? An explosion?

1000617400.english: Hmm. I'll check. Don't worry about it, sir. Here...
1000617400.korean: 흠. 제가 확인해보겠습니다. 손님께선 신경쓰지 마시고, 여기서...

1000617401.english: Oh, my daughter is in Zone A! If something happens...!
1000617401.korean: 우, 우리 딸이 A구역에 있다구요! 무슨 일이 있으면...!

1000617404.english: Haha... Yeah. I guess I've just been incredibly lucky. Today...
1000617404.korean: 후후... 그래요. 그동안 지나치게 운이 좋았던 거겠죠. 오늘...

1000617406.english: Huh?! The explosion is getting closer...?

1000617411.english: Ugh... The arms and legs... are all attached...
1000617411.korean: 으으... 팔다리는... 일단 다 붙어 있네요...

1000617419.english: Oh my, how can this be... all of this...

1000617420.english: The whole park... like Zone C...

1000617421.english: Hey, I need to get out of the park first. Let's get to the exit...
1000617421.korean: 이, 일단 파크에서 나가야겠어요. 어서 출구로...

1000617425.english: Ahaha... What should I do from now on...

1000617426.english: ...First, we need to bury the humans.

1000617427.english: I need to go to my fortune telling shop and get some tools.
1000617427.korean: 제 점술 가게로 가서 도구를 챙겨야겠어요.

1000617430.english: I'm sorry I couldn't keep my promise... You came to see me like this...
1000617430.korean: 약속을... 못지켜서 죄송해요... 이렇게 절 찾아와 주셨는데...

1000617431.english: ...You tried to protect your daughter until the very last moment.

1000617432.english: ......Just a small part of that feeling for us...!

1000617433.english: Woohoo, I guess my head got crushed by the building earlier.
1000617433.korean: 우후후, 아까 건물에 깔려서 머리가 어떻게 됐나봐요.

1000617434.english: ...Little Human, it's uncomfortable here, so I'll move you to a more comfortable place to rest.
1000617434.korean: ...꼬마 인간님, 여기는 불편하니까 편히 쉴 수 있는 곳으로 옮겨드릴게요.

1000617435.english: ......I hope that only happy things will happen there.

1000617437.english: I wanted to make it into a bat shape... Well, I guess there's nothing I can do about it now.
1000617437.korean: 이왕이면 박쥐 모양으로 만들고 싶었는데... 뭐, 지금은 어쩔 수 없겠죠.

1000617438.english: Now, with this, the outside situation... Huh?

1000617441.english: It's completely turned into dust... I worked so hard to make it...!
1000617441.korean: 완전히 가루가 되어버렸네요... 만드느라 얼마나 고생했는데...!

1000617442.english: Sigh... Well, let's make it again. I might get a call from outside in the meantime.
1000617442.korean: 에휴... 뭐, 또 만들어보죠. 그동안 밖에서 연락이 올 수도 있으니까.

1000617443.english: Well, this is a bit greedy. I really need to fix it properly.
1000617443.korean: 음, 이건 좀 욕심 나네요. 반드시 제대로 고쳐놔야겠어요.

1000617444.english: Should I give it a new name? Since I'm basically the park manager now, I guess it's okay to name it whatever I want, right?
1000617444.korean: 이름도 새로 붙일까요? 이제 제가 파크 지배인이나 다름없으니까 마음대로 붙여도 괜찮겠죠?

1000617446.english: Hahaha, that was good. There's no sign of any contact from outside, and since I have some time to spare anyway, I should at least repair Area A.
1000617446.korean: 우후후, 좋았어. 밖에서 연락이 올 기미는 안 보이고, 어차피 시간은 남아도니까 틈틈히 A구역이라도 수리해야겠어요.

1000617447.english: I wish we could restore communication, but it's too difficult...
1000617447.korean: 통신을 복구하면 좋겠는데, 그건 너무 어렵네요...

1000617450.english: What the heck are those? They look like some kind of creepy AGS...
1000617450.korean: 저, 저것들은 대체 뭘까요. 생긴건 징그러운 AGS처럼 생겼는데...

1000617452.english: I need to move. It doesn't seem like it's actively seeking me out, so I'll lure it with a familiar...
1000617452.korean: 자리를 옮겨야겠어요. 적극적으로 저를 찾아내려는 것 같지는 않으니까 패밀리어로 유인해서...

1000617453.english: Area C... there's no other way.

1000617454.english: Haha... I wasn't thinking about it on purpose...
1000617454.korean: 후후... 그동안 일부러 생각하지 않고 있었는데...

1000617455.english: [c][57e137]After a while, the passage connecting Sector C[-][/c]

1000617457.english: Ahaha... how are you still alive...

1000617458.english: But if we just seal this place... we'll be safe for a while.
1000617458.korean: 그래도 여기만 봉인하면... 당분간은 안전할 거예요.

1000617459.english: I'm sorry. I've been sinning against you all until the very end.

1000617460.english: I was going to atone for my sins by dying... but I ended up surviving alone.
1000617460.korean: 죽으면... 그걸로 속죄하려고 했는데... 또 저만 살아남아 버렸어요.

1000617461.english: To me... I don't have the right to do that...

1000617464.english: The sheet touching my bare back was damp with cold sweat. And the area around my eyes...
1000617464.korean: - 등의 맨 살에 닿는 시트가 식은땀으로 축축하게 젖어 있다. 그리고 눈가도...

1000617465.english: - My rapid breathing slowly calms down as I feel his warmth and scent still lingering under the blanket.
1000617465.korean: - 가빴던 호흡이 이불 속에 아직 남아있는 그의 온기와 체취에 천천히 안정되어간다.

1000617466.english: - I turned my head and saw him sitting at his usual desk, manipulating a panel.
1000617466.korean: - 고개를 틀자 늘 쓰는 책상에 앉아 패널을 조작하고 있는 그의 모습.

1000617467.english: I slowly got up, but he didn't seem to notice. What was he doing so early in the morning? Given his personality, it was obvious...
1000617467.korean: - 천천히 몸을 일으켰지만 그는 눈치채지 못한 것 같다. 이런 이른 아침부터 무슨 일을 하고 있는 걸까? 그의 성격을 생각하면 보나마나...

1000617468.english: As I thought about it, a pang deep in my chest arose. A feeling of regret and longing, something I hadn't felt in over a hundred years.
1000617468.korean: - 거기까지 생각이 미치자 가슴 깊은 곳이 따끔거렸다. 백년이 넘는 세월동안 한 번도 느껴보지 못했던, 무언가 안타깝기도 하고 애달픈 감정.

1000617469.english: I forced a sales smile, careful not to let it leak out. I didn't even need to check in the mirror. It was a look I'd worn thousands, tens of thousands of times.
1000617469.korean: - 그것이 새어나오지 않도록 조심하며 영업용 미소를 만들었다. 거울을 확인할 필요도 없다. 수 천, 수 만번이나 지어왔던 표정이니까.

1000617470.english: - When I called, he slowly turned around.

1000617472.english: - I turned around at the sound of a voice behind me and saw Circe, who had already gotten up and was smiling.
1000617472.korean: - 등 뒤에서 들린 목소리에 돌아보자 어느새 일어난 키르케가 웃고 있다.

1000617473.english: No, I'm not the type of person who sleeps in early in the morning.
1000617473.korean: 아뇨, 제가 원래 아침잠이 없는 편이에요.

1000617475.english: By the way, the guests are also...

1000617476.english: In the middle of a consultation... I almost fainted...
1000617476.korean: 한창 상담을 하시다가... 제가 기절할 정도로...

1000617477.english: - Circe slowly approached me and put her arms around my neck as if carrying me from behind.
1000617477.korean: - 천천히 다가온 키르케가 뒤에서 업히듯 내 목에 팔을 걸었다.

1000617479.english: - A while ago, Dutch Girl said she wanted to go back to the park to properly remember her sisters.
1000617479.korean: - 얼마 전 더치걸이 제대로 자매들을 추모하기 위해 파크에 다시 한 번 가고싶다는 말을 했다.

1000617480.english: - I was organizing the route recalculation and the reconnaissance results of the park, which was half reduced to ashes, for him.
1000617480.korean: - 그를 위해 경로 재산정과 반쯤 잿더미가 된 파크의 정찰 결과를 정리하고 있었다.

1000617482.english: - If things had gone as planned, I was going to finish cleaning up earlier this evening and suggest it to Circe...
1000617482.korean: - 원래대로라면 아까 저녁에 정리를 끝내고 키르케에게 권유하려 했었는데...

1000617484.english: What I was going to say before I shut the customer up was...
1000617484.korean: 제가 손님 입을 막기 전에 하시려고 했던 말씀이...

1000617485.english: Hahaha, you told me in advance~ I didn't even know that~
1000617485.korean: 우후후, 미리 말씀하지 그러셨어요~ 저는 그것도 모르고~

1000617486.english: - I couldn't smile and accept Circe's cheerful and playful banter as I usually did.
1000617486.korean: - 유쾌하게 너스레를 떠는 키르케를 나는 평소처럼 웃으며 받아칠 수 없었다.

1000617487.english: Oh my, time flies so fast already?

1000617488.english: We'd better get going! I'll go and get Dutch Girl!
1000617488.korean: 어서 출발하는 게 좋겠어요! 제가 가서 더치걸 님을 불러올게요~!

1000617489.english: - There was something that caught my eye when I saw Circe's obviously unnatural reaction.
1000617489.korean: - 명백히 부자연스러운 키르케의 반응을 보고 짚히는 것이 있었다.

1000617490.english: - Thinking about what Circe must have been through, and the way she looked just now when she heard the Dutch Girl's name...
1000617490.korean: - 키르케가 겪었을 일들과, 방금 전 더치걸의 이름을 듣고 보인 모습을 생각하면...

1000617491.english: - I organized my thoughts and manipulated the panel.

1000617492.english: - After giving a brief overview, I also quickly prepared to leave.
1000617492.korean: - 간단히 개요만을 전한 뒤 나도 서둘러 나갈 채비를 했다.

1000617493.english: There are more Metal Parasites coming from somewhere~ They didn't destroy Area A, did they?
1000617493.korean: 어디선가 또 철충들이 와 있었네요~ A구역을 부수진 않았겠죠?

1000617494.english: Sir, may I come and take a look?

1000617498.english: I'm just a little out of it because I heard that story from the commander as soon as I woke up this morning.
1000617498.korean: 아침에 일어나자마자 사령관한테 그런 얘기를 들어서 조금 정신없을 뿐이야.

1000617499.english: It's good that you prepared in advance. Otherwise, you wouldn't have been able to wear proper clothes.
1000617499.korean: 미리 준비해두길 잘했어. 안그랬으면 옷도 제대로 못 입고 나왔을거야.

1000617500.english: Yeah. I'm glad I can do something like this since I've only ever received things from the Commander.
1000617500.korean: 응. 사령관한테는 받기만 했으니까 이런거라도 할 수 있어서 기뻐.

1000617501.english: And I too... can guess to some extent what Circe is thinking.
1000617501.korean: 그리고 나도... 키르케가 어떤 마음일지는 어느정도 짐작이 가니까.

1000617502.english: - The Dutch girl smiled brightly as I stroked her head and took out a small package from her pocket.
1000617502.korean: - 머리를 쓰다듬어주자 방긋 웃은 더치걸은 주머니에서 작은 꾸러미를 꺼냈다.

1000617503.english: I'm sorry, Commander. You packed this for me to eat...
1000617503.korean: 미안해, 사령관. 사령관이 나 먹으라고 챙겨준건데...

1000617504.english: - The Dutch girl smiled awkwardly and took out some snacks she remembered seeing from the package.
1000617504.korean: - 멋쩍게 웃은 더치걸이 꾸러미에서 본 기억이 있는 간식들을 꺼냈다.

1000617505.english: Last time I came here and found out the truth... I left it uneaten.
1000617505.korean: 저번에 여기 와서 진실을 알게되고... 안 먹고 남겨놨었어.

1000617506.english: - The Dutch Girl piled snacks on the large building debris.
1000617506.korean: - 더치걸은 커다란 건물 파편에 간식들을 차곡차곡 쌓았다.

1000617507.english: I'm sorry, sisters. I should have come sooner...
1000617507.korean: 미안해, 자매들. 더 빨리 왔었어야 하는데...

1000617508.english: - I also folded my hands next to the Dutch girl who was holding her hands together and closing her eyes.
1000617508.korean: - 손을 모으고 눈을 감는 더치걸의 옆에서 나도 두 손을 모았다.

1000617510.english: Yeah, no. The Commander is always busy with us.
1000617510.korean: 으응, 아니야. 사령관은 언제나 우리 때문에 바쁘잖아.

1000617511.english: Just for bringing me here... I'm so grateful.

1000617512.english: - I stood there for a while, looking at the collapsed buildings and the snacks the Dutch girl had brought, holding my hand tightly.
1000617512.korean: - 내 손을 꼬옥 붙잡는 더치걸과 함께, 한동안 무너진 건물들과 더치걸이 가져온 간식들을 바라보고 서있었다.

1000617513.english: - After finishing her prayer, the Dutch girl nodded slightly at me and disappeared into the ruined C area, saying she would take a look around.
1000617513.korean: - 기도를 마친 더치걸은 나한테 살짝 끄덕여보이곤 한바퀴 둘러보겠다며 폐허가 된 C구역 안쪽으로 사라졌다.

1000617514.english: - As I sat down on a piece of suitable building debris, watching the Dutch girl's back, I heard footsteps behind me.
1000617514.korean: - 그런 더치걸의 뒷모습을 배웅하며 적당한 건물 파편에 걸터앉자 뒤에서 발소리가 들렸다.

1000617515.english: Fortunately, it's fine~ It's the same as last time.

1000617516.english: That's right! Sir, would you like to ride the 'Special Witch Illusion' that you missed last time?
1000617516.korean: 맞다! 손님, 저번에 못 타신 '특급 마녀 일루젼'을 이참에 타보시겠어요?

1000617517.english: - Circe, who didn't seem to have any intention of recommending anything further, sat down next to me without any hesitation and looked in the direction where the Dutch girl had disappeared.
1000617517.korean: - 딱히 더 권할 생각은 없었는지 키르케는 미련없이 내 옆에 앉아 더치걸이 사라진 방향을 바라봤다.

1000617518.english: Did you get a lot of tea?

1000617519.english: - Circe treats everyone with kindness and friendliness, her characteristic wit.
1000617519.korean: - 키르케는 그 특유의 입담과 친화력으로 누구에게나 사근사근하게 대한다.

1000617520.english: - But there are some members who are particularly reluctant to face Circe. The Dutch Girl is particularly bad at it.
1000617520.korean: - 하지만 그런 키르케가 유독 대면하는 것을 꺼리는 대원들이 몇몇 있다. 더치걸은 특히 심하고.

1000617521.english: - It's not like I'm being overtly serious or anything... but I try not to keep the conversation going as long as I did when I came here.
1000617521.korean: - 대놓고 정색하거나 하는 것은 아니지만... 이곳으로 올 때처럼 가급적 대화를 오래 이어가려 하지 않는다.

1000617523.english: - Circe sighed softly and opened her mouth quietly.
1000617523.korean: - 작게 한숨을 내쉰 키르케가 조용히 입을 열었다.

1000617524.english: Before the destruction of humanity, when I was working as one of the many Circes in the park...
1000617524.korean: 인간님들이 멸망하기 전, 파크에서 여러 키르케 중 하나로 일할 때...

1000617525.english: I had many different jobs, but the most important one was serving and guiding guests.
1000617525.korean: 제 업무는 여러가지 있었지만... 제일 중요한 일은 손님응대와 안내였어요.

1000617526.english: Do you remember when I gave you a tour when I met you?
1000617526.korean: 제가 손님을 만났을 때 투어를 해드렸던 거, 기억하시죠?

1000617527.english: - Circe said that and smiled weakly.
1000617527.korean: - 그렇게 말한 키르케는 힘없는 미소를 지었다.

1000617528.english: It was fun and rewarding to guide the little humans in Area A, or those who weren't interested in such things.
1000617528.korean: A구역에서 꼬마 인간님들이나... 그런 거에 관심 없는 인간님들을 안내하는 건 즐거웠어요. 보람차기도 했고요.

1000617529.english: ...Area B wasn't that difficult. I just guided the guests.
1000617529.korean: ...B구역도 그렇게까지 힘들진 않았어요. 저는 그저 손님분들께 이용안내만 했으니까요.

1000617530.english: Of course, my colleagues often got dragged away by customers while giving directions, but I was lucky.
1000617530.korean: 물론 제 동료들이 안내를 하다가 손님께 끌려가는 일은 자주 있었지만, 저는 운이 좋았었죠.

1000617531.english: - Having said that, Circe closed her mouth again.
1000617531.korean: - 거기까지 말한 키르케는 다시 입을 다물었다.

1000617532.english: - The fist clenched on his knee was trembling.
1000617532.korean: - 무릎 위에서 꼭 쥔 주먹이 떨리고 있었다.

1000617534.english: Area C... Once I gave the tour, I couldn't stay sane for a few days.
1000617534.korean: C구역은... 한 번 안내를 하고 나면 며칠간은 제정신으로 있을 수가 없었어요.

1000617535.english: Those who were caught without knowing anything, those who came with high expectations, having heard some kind of sweet talk...
1000617535.korean: 아무것도 모르고 붙잡혀 오신 분들, 무슨 사탕발림을 들었는지 기대감에 차서 오신 분들...

1000617536.english: Those who have already given up, those who have noticed something, those who are screaming that they don't want to...
1000617536.korean: 무언가 눈치챘는지 이미 포기하신 분들, 싫다고 비명을 질러대는 분들...

1000617537.english: All of those people... never came out of the C-Sector fence again.
1000617537.korean: 그 모든 분들이... 다시는 C구역 울타리 밖으로 나오지 못하셨죠.

1000617538.english: - Circe looked at the remains of a huge door that lay scattered like scrap metal.
1000617538.korean: - 키르케가 고철이되어 나뒹구는 거대한 문의 잔해에 눈길을 주었다.

1000617539.english: As I was guiding, I heard screams and crying from all directions.
1000617539.korean: 안내하는 동안 사방에서 비명소리와 울음소리가 들려왔어요.

1000617540.english: The guests would laugh even more cheerfully as they heard that.
1000617540.korean: 손님들은 그걸 들으며 더욱 더 유쾌하게 웃곤 했죠.

1000617541.english: - I thought I knew enough about it from my previous experience and the records I looked up separately... but when I hear it again like this, I find myself clenching my fists without realizing it.
1000617541.korean: - 저번의 경험과 따로 찾아본 기록으로 충분히 알고 있다고 생각했지만... 막상 이렇게 다시 들으니 나도 모르게 주먹에 힘이 들어간다.

1000617542.english: If that were all, it might have been bearable. But then one day... there was a little commotion.
1000617542.korean: 그것만이었으면 참을만 했을지도 몰라요. 그런데 어느날... 작은 소동이 있었어요.

1000617543.english: Whether it was intentional release or a last ounce of strength, a Bioroid escaped from one of the numerous shops in Sector C.
1000617543.korean: 일부러 놓아준 건지, 아니면 마지막 힘을 짜냈던 건지. C구역의 수많은 가게 중 하나에서 바이오로이드 한 분이 탈출하셨어요.

1000617544.english: Of course, it didn't go very far. It was a miracle that it could move at all.
1000617544.korean: 물론 멀리가진 못했어요. 그렇게라도 움직이는 게 신기할 정도였으니까요.

1000617545.english: He collapsed in front of me, his strength drained, and he looked up at me, his mouth gaping.
1000617545.korean: 그 분은 제 앞에서 힘이 다해 쓰러졌고, 저를 올려다보며 입을 뻐끔거렸어요.

1000617547.english: She was a Dutch Girl model. She was wearing a dress that was obviously very pretty, but was torn to shreds.
1000617547.korean: 더치걸 모델이었어요. 원래는 아주 예뻤을게 분명한 갈기갈기 찢어진 드레스를 입고 계셨었죠.

1000617548.english: I just stood there dumbfounded, unable to do anything until he was dragged away again.
1000617548.korean: 저는 그분이 다시 끌려갈 때까지 아무 것도 못하고 멍하니 서있었어요.

1000617549.english: Haha, it's okay up to there. I'll still have nightmares, but... I think I'll be able to endure it if I drink.
1000617549.korean: 후후, 거기까지도 괜찮아요. 악몽에 시달리긴 하겠지만... 술을 마시면 버틸 수 있었을 거예요.

1000617552.english: I'm glad it's not me over there. I'm glad it's not me being dragged away by those eyes that have lost even despair...
1000617552.korean: 저기 있는게 내가 아니라서 다행이다. 절망조차 사라진 눈동자로 끌려가고 있는게 내가 아니라서 다행이다...

1000617553.english: I'm glad the screams coming from the store next door aren't mine, I'm glad the pieces of clothing strewn across the street aren't mine...
1000617553.korean: 옆 가게에서 들려오는 비명소리가 내 목소리가 아니라서 다행이다, 길가에 나뒹구는 옷조각이 내 옷이 아니라서 다행이다...

1000617555.english: Haha... How could I face Dutch Girl with such a face?
1000617555.korean: 후후... 그런 제가 무슨 낯으로 더치걸 님을 보겠어요?

1000617556.english: - Circe, who smiled briefly as if she would disappear at any moment, returned to her usual face.
1000617556.korean: - 당장이라도 사라질 것 같이 잠깐 웃어보인 키르케가 다시 평소의 얼굴로 돌아왔다.

1000617557.english: Oh my, I've been talking too much.

1000617558.english: The guest is more interested in physical... than in conversation like this.

1000617559.english: - Circe shut her mouth as I smiled bitterly without saying anything.
1000617559.korean: - 내가 말없이 쓴웃음을 짓자 키르케는 입을 다물었다.

1000617560.english: Thank you. I've never had anyone to talk to about this before.
1000617560.korean: 고마워요. 지금까진 이런 이야기를 할만한 사람이 없었거든요.

1000617561.english: Hehehe, as I told Yumi before... you did a great job sending the letter to the customer.
1000617561.korean: 후훗, 전에 유미 님한테도 말했지만... 손님께 편지를 보내길 정말로 잘했어요.

1000617562.english: - Circe stretched her body and got up from her seat.
1000617562.korean: - 키르케는 몸을 쭉 펴며 기지개를 켜고는 자리에서 일어났다.

1000617563.english: It may be hypocrisy, but... I need to apologize to Dutch Girl here someday.
1000617563.korean: 어차피 위선이겠지만... 언젠가 여기 계신 더치걸 님에게라도 사과를 해야해요.

1000617564.english: Could you keep it a secret until I'm mentally ready?
1000617564.korean: 제가 마음의 준비가 될 때까지는 비밀로 해주세요?

1000617569.english: I think it's inevitable to think that way.
1000617569.korean: 그런 생각을 하는 건 어쩔 수 없다고 생각해.

1000617570.english: If I had kept seeing that kind of sight... I would have thought the same thing.
1000617570.korean: 그런 광경을... 계속 봐왔다면 나라도 그렇게 생각했을거야.

1000617572.english: But still, feeling guilty about it and trying to apologize... is absolutely not hypocrisy.
1000617572.korean: 그래도 거기에 죄책감을 느끼고 사과하려하는 건... 절대로 위선이 아니야.

1000617573.english: You wanted to apologize, right? Yeah, I forgive you. And...
1000617573.korean: 사과하고 싶댔지? 응, 나는 용서할게. 그리고...

1000617574.english: The other sisters, even the one Circe saw, would probably forgive her. After all, they were in the same situation.
1000617574.korean: 다른 자매들도, 키르케가 본 그 자매도 아마 용서해 줄거야. 결국 서로 같은 처지였는걸.

1000617575.english: - As Dutch said... if something had been just a little off or the order had changed, Circe wouldn't be here now.
1000617575.korean: - 더치의 말대로... 조금만 무언가 어긋나거나 순서가 바뀌었다면 키르케는 지금 이곳에 없었겠지.

1000617576.english: - The Dutch girl slowly approached Circe, who was bowing her head.
1000617576.korean: - 더치걸은 천천히 고개를 숙이고 있는 키르케에게 다가갔다.

1000617577.english: If that's not enough... Come with me whenever I come here to pay my respects to my sisters. Commander, is that okay?
1000617577.korean: 그래도 부족하다면... 내가 여기에 자매들을 추모하러 올 때마다 같이 와줘. 사령관, 그래도 괜찮아?

1000617578.english: Yes, that's right. Circe is used to guiding, so I'll ask her to do it.
1000617578.korean: 응, 그렇대. 키르케는 안내하는 건 익숙할테니까, 부탁할게.

1000617580.english: - Circe barely managed to answer in her main voice.

1000617581.english: Thank you so much for apologizing.

1000617583.english: - Circe knelt down and hugged Dutch's small body.
1000617583.korean: - 키르케는 무릎을 꿇고 앉아 더치의 작은 몸을 껴안았다.

1000617584.english: - Until the shaking in her shoulders subsided, Dutch gently stroked Circe's back.
1000617584.korean: - 어깨의 떨림이 잦아들 때까지, 더치는 그런 키르케의 등을 가만히 쓸어주고 있었다.

1000617585.english: - It took a long time for Circe to calm down.

1000617586.english: - This time, Dutch went to really look around the ruins, and Circe hesitated for a while before making a decision and returned to her usual self and sat next to me.
1000617586.korean: - 더치는 이번엔 진짜로 폐허를 둘러보러 갔고, 키르케는 우물쭈물하다 결단을 내렸는지 평소의 모습으로 돌아와 내 곁에 앉았다.

1000617587.english: Hahaha, thanks to you, I was able to put down the burden on my mind that I had been carrying for over 100 years. How could that be?
1000617587.korean: 우후후, 덕분에 100년 넘게 지고 있던 마음의 짐을 내려놨는데 그럴리가요.

1000617588.english: Still... if Dutch Girl hadn't forgiven me, I would have used this crystal ball to predict the guest's unfortunate future.
1000617588.korean: 그래도... 만약 더치걸 님이 용서해주지 않았다면 이 수정구로 손님의 불행한 미래를 점쳐봤겠지만요.

1000617589.english: - Circe joked and took out a crystal ball from her bosom.
1000617589.korean: - 키르케가 농담을 던지며 품에서 수정구를 꺼냈다.

1000617590.english: Since we're here, should I tell you my fortune? It'll be a while before Dutch Girl gets back.
1000617590.korean: 모처럼이니 점을 쳐드릴까요? 더치걸 님이 돌아오시려면 좀 걸릴테니까요.

1000617591.english: I heard a lot of people say I'm brave before, right?
1000617591.korean: 저, 예전에 용하다는 소리 엄청 많이 들었다구요?

1000617592.english: - Circe, facing me, pulled her witch hat down low and cleared her throat.
1000617592.korean: - 나와 마주본 키르케는 마녀모자를 푹 눌러쓰고 흠흠 목을 가다듬었다.

1000617594.english: A professional fortune teller like me can tell just by looking at a face. Don't ruin the mood.
1000617594.korean: 저 같은 프로 점술가는 얼굴만 봐도 안다구욧. 분위기 깨지 마세욧.

1000617595.english: - Circe pouted and placed her hand on the crystal ball again.
1000617595.korean: - 키르케는 입을 삐죽이며 다시 수정구에 손을 올렸다.

1000617598.english: - Circe, who had been chuckling for a moment, returned to a serious expression.
1000617598.korean: - 잠깐 씨익 웃었던 키르케가 다시 진지한 표정을 지었다.

1000617599.english: You, sir, are carrying a heavy fate.

1000617600.english: And the people around them... want to share in the burden of such guests even just a little.
1000617600.korean: 그리고 주변에 계신 분들은... 그런 손님의 부담을 조금이라도 나눠받고 싶어해요.

1000617601.english: - Circe, who had been looking at me seriously for a while, smiled again.
1000617601.korean: - 한동안 진지하게 나를 바라보던 키르케가 다시 생긋 웃었다.

1000617603.english: - Circe handed me the crystal ball she was carrying.
1000617603.korean: - 키르케는 지니고 다니던 수정구를 나에게 내밀었다.

1000617604.english: Yes, the fortune teller is going out of business now.

1000617605.english: There are people in Orca who have near-true prophecy abilities, so there is no need for fortune tellers anymore.
1000617605.korean: 오르카에는 진짜 예언에 가까운 능력을 가진 분도 계시니까, 돌팔이 점술가는 더이상 필요 없겠죠.

1000617606.english: - As I accepted the crystal ball, Circe smiled relievedly and whispered to me.
1000617606.korean: - 내가 수정구를 받아들자 키르케가 후련하게 웃으며 나에게 속삭였다.

1000617607.english: May your future be filled with only happiness.

1000617609.english: - At the Dutch Girl's call, Circe and I turned our gazes at the same time.
1000617609.korean: - 더치걸의 부름에 키르케와 동시에 시선을 돌렸다.

1000617612.english: - Perhaps because winter has passed and the weather has warmed up, there are small sprouts among the debris of the building.
1000617612.korean: - 겨울이 지나고 날씨가 풀려서일까, 건물 잔해 틈에 작은 새싹이 있다.

1000617614.english: What kind of plant is it?

1000617615.english: Well... I'm not sure just by looking at this...

1000617616.english: I was growing primulas in the flower bed in Zone A, isn't that it?
1000617616.korean: A구역 화단에 프리뮬라를 키우고 있었는데, 그거 아닐까요?

1000617617.english: - I sat back down on the rubble where I had been talking to Circe, watching the two chattering away.
1000617617.korean: - 재잘대는 둘을 보며 키르케와 이야기를 나누던 잔해에 다시 걸터앉았다.

1000617618.english: - Beneath my feet, a green sprout was poking its head out.
1000617618.korean: - 내 발밑에도, 푸른 새싹 하나가 고개를 내밀고 있었다.

1000617621.english: Hehe, when did I become so worried... This is what it means to be a girl with many dreams.
1000617621.korean: 후훗, 어느새 이렇게 고민하게 되었는지... 이래서야 꿈많은 소녀이옵니다.

1000617622.english: ......As expected, I guess I'll have to do it my way.

1000617625.english: Oh, hello. I have something to give to the Commander...
1000617625.korean: 아, 안녕하세요. 저기, 사령관한테 줄 게 있어서...

1000617626.english: Chocolate? Valentine's Day has already passed.

1000617627.english: That, that's it... Every time I try to give it to you, something happens...
1000617627.korean: 그, 그게요... 주려고 할 때마다 번번히 사건이 터져서...

1000617629.english: The master has a prior engagement with me, so please come visit me next time.
1000617629.korean: 지금 주인께선 저와 선약이 있으시니, 다음에 찾아오시지요.

1000617630.english: Oh, yes... when will it be finished?

1000617631.english: Tomorrow morning... no, it might take a few days.
1000617631.korean: 내일 아침... 아니, 며칠 정도 걸릴지도 모르겠사옵니다.

1000617632.english: Miss Aurora, did the Master ever question you about the wound on your finger?
1000617632.korean: 아우로라 양. 혹시 주인께서 손가락의 상처를 추궁하시진 않으셨사옵니까?

1000617633.english: That's what happened... I said I got hurt while cooking, just like the chef said...
1000617633.korean: 그랬었는데... 주방장님 말씀대로 요리하다가 다쳤다고 했어요...

1000617635.english: Thank you for your generous request.

1000617636.english: It's okay. I was surprised when he suddenly pulled out a knife, but I've been through worse things now.
1000617636.korean: 괜찮아요. 그땐 갑자기 칼을 꺼내셔서 놀라긴 햇지만, 이제 저는 그것보다 심한 일도 겪어 봤으니까요.

1000617638.english: But... where are you going to use my blood?
1000617638.korean: 그런데... 제 피는 어디다 쓰시는 거예요?

1000617639.english: ...The master will be here soon. Would you please excuse me?

1000617640.english: Yes... It will take some time, if not a few days, so please take care of the kitchen in the meantime.
1000617640.korean: 그래... 며칠까진 아니어도 다소 시간이 걸릴 것이니, 그동안 주방을 부탁드리옵니다.

1000617641.english: Haha, you don't have to worry too much.

1000617642.english: All of Orca's maids, including Vanilla and Hachiko, have done their part.
1000617642.korean: 바닐라 양과 하치코 양을 포함해, 오르카의 메이드 분들은 전부 제 몫을 다하게 되었사옵니다.

1000617643.english: So, Aurora-san only needs to take care of the overall management.
1000617643.korean: 그러니 아우로라 양은 전반적인 관리만 하면 되옵니다.

1000617646.english: [c][57e137]At the same time, the commander headed towards Sowan[-][/c]

1000617647.english: - I received a call from Sowan while I was handling other work.
1000617647.korean: - 다른 업무를 처리하고 있는 사이 소완에게 호출을 받았다.

1000617648.english: - Lise and Lilith, who had become close friends at some point, were just out together again. This must have been an opportunity Sowan couldn't miss.
1000617648.korean: - 어느샌가 의기투합 해버린 리제와 리리스가 조금 전에 또다시 함께 어디론가 나간 참이다. 소완에게는 놓칠 수 없는 기회였겠지.

1000617649.english: "What plot will they hatch this time?" I thought as I walked, arriving at the captain's cabin.
1000617649.korean: - 이번에는 무슨 음모를 꾸밀런지. 생각하며 걷는 새에 함장실에 도착했다.

1000617650.english: - As I entered, Sowan slowly put what she was holding down under the chair.
1000617650.korean: - 내가 들어서자 소완은 손에 들고있던 것을 천천히 의자 밑에 내려놓았다.

1000617651.english: - An unidentified liquid sloshes inside an opaque bottle.
1000617651.korean: - 불투명한 병 안에서 정체모를 액체가 찰랑인다.

1000617653.english: Haha, haven't you ever had a chance to talk to your master alone?
1000617653.korean: 후후, 그간 주인과 단 둘이 이야기할 기회가 없었지 않사옵니까.

1000617655.english: - Simple food on a small table... and that's probably alcohol.
1000617655.korean: - 작은 탁자에 간단한 음식과... 저건 아마 술이겠지.

1000617656.english: I'm sorry. I made you wait... first. I apologize for the inconvenience.

1000617657.english: - As he said, Sowan seemed a little drunk, his face was red and his speech was somewhat languid.
1000617657.korean: - 그말대로 소완은 조금 취한듯, 얼굴이 빨갛고 말투도 어딘가 나른했다.

1000617659.english: Haha, I knew you'd say that.

1000617660.english: - I felt a little uncomfortable seeing So-Wan back down so quietly.
1000617660.korean: - 의외로 순순히 물러나는 소완의 모습에 조금 위화감이 들었다.

1000617661.english: - Since Lise and Lilith were away, I thought you'd try something, but did it end with just offering drinks?
1000617661.korean: - 마침 리제와 리리스가 자리를 비웠으니 무언가 시도할 줄 알았는데, 술 권유로 끝인건가?

1000617662.english: Then, please try one of these side dishes that I have painstakingly prepared.
1000617662.korean: 그럼 소첩이 공들여 만든 이 안주라도 한 점 드셔주시옵소서.

1000617663.english: - Sowan picked up the side dish with chopsticks.

1000617665.english: - I said it without thinking much, but seeing Sowan's reaction made me feel even more uncomfortable.
1000617665.korean: - 별 생각 없이 말했지만 소완의 반응을 보고 위화감이 더 심해졌다.

1000617666.english: - And that bottle you were hiding when you came in...

1000617667.english: My lord, this is something I cooked with all my heart and soul for you.
1000617667.korean: 주, 주인을 위해 소첩이 열과 성을 다해 요리한 것이옵니다.

1000617669.english: - I felt certain when I saw Sowan lowering his eyes without saying a word.
1000617669.korean: - 말없이 눈을 내리까는 소완을 보고 확신이 들었다.

1000617671.english: - I sighed involuntarily when I saw Sowan with her mouth shut.
1000617671.korean: - 입을 다문 소완을 보고 절로 한숨이 나왔다.

1000617672.english: - The other members' evaluations are the same, and I thought it had become much more lenient recently, but it's back to square one again.
1000617672.korean: - 다른 대원들의 평가도 그렇고, 요새 많이 부드러워졌다 했더니 또다시 원점이다.

1000617673.english: Sir, there's a misunderstanding. I didn't put anything in the food.
1000617673.korean: 주인, 오해이옵니다. 음식엔 아무 것도 넣지 않았사옵니다.

1000617674.english: Sowan's eyes wavered. He picked up a piece of snack as he watched.
1000617674.korean: - 소완의 눈빛이 흔들렸다. 그것을 보며 안주를 한 점 집어들었다.

1000617675.english: - Sowan, who had been bowing her head, slowly opened her mouth.
1000617675.korean: - 고개를 푹 숙이고 있던 소완이 천천히 입을 벌렸다.

1000617676.english: - Sowan's throat moved as he closed his eyes tightly.
1000617676.korean: - 눈을 질끈 감은 소완의 목울대가 움직였다.

1000617677.english: - Now all that's left is to take Sowan back to her room. While I wait for her to wake up, I'll consider an appropriate disciplinary measure.
1000617677.korean: - 이제 잠든 소완을 방으로 데려다 주는 일만 남았군. 일어나길 기다리면서 적절한 징계를 생각해봐야겠다.

1000617678.english: Sowan, who thought she would soon fall asleep or become dazed, let out a sigh of relief.
1000617678.korean: - 곧 스르르 잠들거나 멍해질 것이라 생각했던 소완이 괴로운 숨을 내뱉었다.

1000617680.english: - Sowan's face was redder than before, and her breathing was ragged.
1000617680.korean: - 소완의 얼굴은 조금 전보다도 붉었고, 숨도 거칠다.

1000617681.english: - As I was trying to support Sowan, who was swaying precariously while sitting, an idea occurred to me.
1000617681.korean: - 앉은 상태로 위태롭게 휘청거리는 소완을 부축하려다 어떤 생각이 들었다.

1000617683.english: I didn't put anything in it.

1000617687.english: This is the only way I know.

1000617689.english: - Sowan clutched her chest tightly and continued speaking with difficulty.
1000617689.korean: - 소완은 가슴께에 손을 꼭 움켜쥐고 힘겹게 말을 이어갔다.

1000617690.english: I met the Master and tried to change. However... no matter how much I thought about it, I couldn't think of any other way to win his heart...
1000617690.korean: 주인을 만나고 바뀌려고 노력했사옵니다. 허나... 아무리 생각해도 이것 외에는 주인의 마음을 얻을 방도가... 도저히 생각나지 않았사옵니다...

1000617691.english: Master... I love you more than anything in this world...

1000617693.english: I'll gladly accept any punishment later, so please... for now...
1000617693.korean: 이후에 어떤 벌이라도 달게 받을테니, 지금은 부디...

1000617694.english: - I spoke harshly on purpose, but Sowan smiled brightly, panting.
1000617694.korean: - 일부러 강경하게 말했지만, 소완은 숨을 헐떡이면서도 빙그레 웃었다.

1000617695.english: Haha... If the master understands my sincerity... then such things will not happen in the future.
1000617695.korean: 후후... 주인께서 소첩의 진심을 알아주신다면... 앞으로 그럴 일은 없을 것이옵니다.

1000617696.english: - It may be because of the alcohol, but Sowan's eyes lack their usual sharpness.
1000617696.korean: - 술기운 때문인 것도 있겠지만, 소완의 눈빛엔 평소의 날카로움이 없다.

1000617697.english: Instead, joy, anticipation, affection... and exclusivity...
1000617697.korean: - 그대신 기쁨과 기대, 애정... 그리고 독점욕...

1000617699.english: I know all the worries you have...
1000617699.korean: 주인께서 하고 계신 걱정... 다 알고 있사옵니다.

1000617700.english: This is how I was born... I cannot completely abandon the thought of wanting to make my master my concubine.
1000617700.korean: 소첩은 이렇게 태어난 바... 주인을 소첩의 것으로 만들고자 하는 생각을 완전히 버릴 수는 없사옵니다.

1000617702.english: - Sowan reached out with a trembling finger and pressed it to my lips.
1000617702.korean: - 소완이 떨리는 손가락을 뻗어 내 입술을 눌렀다.

1000617703.english: Thanks to the owner's expectations... I was able to make some concessions.
1000617703.korean: 주인의 기대에 힘입어... 다소 양보할 수는 있게되었사옵니다.

1000617704.english: Please, just for this time with you, Haoni... Please become the master of your own.
1000617704.korean: 하오니 소첩과 함께하는 이 시간만... 소첩만의 주인이 되어 주시옵소서.

1000617707.english: - I took a quick shower and returned to the captain's cabin.

1000617708.english: - As I was tidying up the disheveled bed sheets and turning on the ventilation system, the captain's cabin door opened.
1000617708.korean: - 흐트러진 침대 시트를 정리하고 환기 설비를 가동하고 있을 때 함장실 문이 열렸다.

1000617709.english: Commander...? Are you here this time...? The meal is ready.
1000617709.korean: 사령관...? 이번엔 있어...? 식사 준비 다됐어.

1000617710.english: Uh, yeah... ahaha, that, is that so?

1000617711.english: - Aurora, who entered the captain's room hesitantly, turned her gaze to the corner of the captain's room.
1000617711.korean: - 쭈뼛거리며 함장실로 들어온 아우로라의 시선이 함장실 구석으로 향했다.

1000617713.english: - There are still some leftover side dishes that I forgot to clean up.
1000617713.korean: - 그곳엔 깜빡하고 미처 치우지 않은 소완의 안주가 남아있다.

1000617714.english: This quality... I can tell at a glance that it was made by a chef...
1000617714.korean: 이 퀄리티... 한 눈에 봐도 주방장님이 하신 걸 알겠어...

1000617715.english: - Aurora put the snack in her mouth before I could stop her.
1000617715.korean: - 아우로라는 내가 말리기도 전에 안주를 입에 넣었다.

1000617717.english: As expected, Aurora turned to me with a blank expression. Why did this happen...
1000617717.korean: - 역시나 아우로라는 나에게 멍한 얼굴을 향했다. 어째서 이런 일이...

1000617719.english: It's so delicious! The chef is really amazing!

1000617720.english: Even though it's cooled down, it's still... Huh? What?

1000617721.english: - I asked Aurora again, who had a question mark floating above her head.
1000617721.korean: - 머리 위에 물음표를 띄우는 아우로라에게 재차 물었다.

1000617722.english: What the heck does that mean?!

1000617723.english: - I passed by the very flustered Aurora and took a bite of the snack.
1000617723.korean: - 몹시 당황한 아우로라를 지나쳐 나도 안주를 한 점 입에 넣었다.

1000617724.english: - It's just an ordinary... no, just a delicious snack.
1000617724.korean: - 그냥 평범한... 아니, 맛있는 안주일 뿐이다.

1000617725.english: Ma, even though we haven't met for long...!

1000617726.english: The Commander is a strange person, but somehow I'm attracted to him, but ah, not yet...!
1000617726.korean: 사령관은 이상한 인간님이면서도 왠지 끌리고 그러긴 하지만 아, 아직 그런건...!

1000617727.english: Ah, yeah... ahaha, oh, it was a misunderstanding... I see...
1000617727.korean: 아, 응... 아하하, 오, 오해였구나아... 그랬구나...

1000617729.english: - I tried the side dish Sowan prepared once again, but it was still fine. That means...
1000617729.korean: - 다시 한 번 소완이 준비한 안주를 먹어보았지만 여전히 멀쩡하다. 그렇다는건...

1000617730.english: "I didn't lie," Sowan's voice seemed to be heard from outside the door.
1000617730.korean: - 거짓말은 하지 않았사옵니다, 하는 소완의 목소리가 문 밖에서 들린 것만 같았다.

1000617733.english: Hehehe... Let's go somewhere where we can be alone... This joy...
1000617733.korean: 후후후... 어서 혼자 있을 수 있는 곳으로... 이 기쁨을...

1000617736.english: Yeah... I think I heard it clearly...

1000617737.english: More importantly, Hachiko. What's the matter?

1000617738.english: Ah! I'm trying to get the cooking utensils from the castle to the Orca kitchen, but there's an AGS still running.
1000617738.korean: 아! 성에서 조리 도구를 오르카 주방으로 가져오려는데, 아직 가동중인 AGS가 있어요.

1000617739.english: So I wanted to tell the owner...

1000617740.english: Huh...? I smell like the master from Sowan.

1000617741.english: That's because I just came back from seeing the owner.
1000617741.korean: 방금 주인을 뵙고 오는 길이라 그럴것이옵니다.

1000617743.english: Haha, by the way, that's wonderful. I wonder when you came up with that idea...
1000617743.korean: 후후, 그나저나 기특하옵니다. 어느새 스스로 그런 생각을 하게 되신 것인지...

1000617745.english: I will do more for you in the future.

1000617746.english: Hmm...? It's nice to be petted, but... Sowan seems strange today...
1000617746.korean: 웅...? 쓰다듬어줘서 좋긴한데... 소완 오늘 이상한 것 같...

1000617747.english: My concubine will accompany you to the castle. I will also convey this message to the master.
1000617747.korean: 성에는 소첩이 함께 가겠사옵니다. 주인께도 소첩이 전하지요.

1000617748.english: It would be a good idea to work with AGS and pick out some useful tools and equipment there.
1000617748.korean: 함께 AGS를 처리하고 그곳의 쓸만한 도구와 설비를 골라내는 것이 좋겠사옵니다.

1000617749.english: Right, then can Fotia and Vanilla go together too?
1000617749.korean: 맞다, 그럼 포티아랑 바닐라도 같이 가도 돼요?

1000617750.english: Of course, that would be a good study too.

1000617754.english: It smells sweet... what is it?

1000617757.english: Hmm... Sowan is acting weird today...

1000617759.english: Stalker, have you ever thought about joining us as a companion?
1000617759.korean: 스토커, 생각은 좀 해봤어? 컴패니언으로 들어오라는 거.

1000617760.english: You'd better decide quickly, because I won't be extending the deadline any further.
1000617760.korean: 더이상은 기한을 연장해주지 않을테니 어서 결정하는게 좋을거야.

1000617761.english: Huh, are you trying to tie me up like that and monopolize the master?
1000617761.korean: 흥, 그렇게 나를 옭아매고 주인님을 독차지하려는거지?

1000617762.english: Do you think I'd fall for such a petty trick?
1000617762.korean: 그런 시시한 수작에 넘어갈 것 같아?

1000617763.english: Well, that's half true. It's better to keep a dangerous person like you under my control.
1000617763.korean: 뭐, 반쯤은 맞아. 너같은 위험인물은 내 통제하에 두는게 더 나으니까.

1000617764.english: But if you keep going like this, you won't even be able to be your master's slave for the rest of your life, right?
1000617764.korean: 그래도 너는 이러다간 평생 주인님의 노리개조차 되지 못할걸?

1000617765.english: Even if you are the lowest in rank, if you join the Companion... I will guarantee you at least the minimum.
1000617765.korean: 가장 서열이 낮아도 컴패니언에 들어오면... 최소한도로는 보장해주겠어.

1000617766.english: Pest... The master clearly stated that he was entirely mine...
1000617766.korean: 해충... 주인님은 온전히 나만의 것이라고 분명히 말했어...

1000617767.english: Oh, really? Okay. My patience is starting to wear thin.
1000617767.korean: 아아, 그래? 좋아. 슬슬 내 인내심도 한계야.

1000617768.english: The good release is now over. There will be no next time...
1000617768.korean: 착한 리리스는 이제 끝. 다음은 없...

1000617771.english: This pest! You've been avoiding me all this time, and now...!
1000617771.korean: 이 해충! 지금껏 나를 피해다니더니, 이제야...!

1000617772.english: Because of you... because of you, my swimsuit!
1000617772.korean: 너 때문에... 너 때문에 내 수영복이!

1000617773.english: You pest, you have holes in your swimsuit too...!

1000617774.english: Are you still keeping that in mind? I didn't realize it.
1000617774.korean: 그것을 아직까지 마음에 담아두신 것이옵니까. 미처 몰랐사옵니다.

1000617775.english: I would like to take this opportunity to apologize.

1000617779.english: You... are a little strange today?

1000617780.english: Did you finally lose your mind after drinking that weird tea you were making?
1000617780.korean: 네가 만들던 그 이상한 차를 먹고 드디어 머리가 돌아버리기라도 한 거야?

1000617781.english: Haha, that car hasn't been made in a long time.
1000617781.korean: 후후, 그 차는 만들지 않은지 오래되었사옵니다.

1000617782.english: By the way, where have you two been wandering around these days?
1000617782.korean: 그런데 두 분께서는 요즘 어디를 그렇게 돌아다니시는 것이옵니까?

1000617783.english: I don't know about Miss Lise, but I don't think it's a good thing for the captain of the guard to be away from his post so often.
1000617783.korean: 리제 양이면 모를까, 경호대장님이 자주 자리를 비우시는 것은 좋지 않다고 생각되옵니다.

1000617784.english: Hmm, I don't know about cooks like you, but...
1000617784.korean: 흥, 너 같은 요리사는 잘 모르겠지만...

1000617785.english: The master is always double or triple-guarded by other units.
1000617785.korean: 주인님은 다른 부대들에게 언제나 2중 3중으로 경호받고 계시거든.

1000617786.english: There's always a change in security there, but one of our companions is always on standby, ready to rush to the master at any moment.
1000617786.korean: 거기에 밀착 경호는 늘 바뀌지만, 항상 우리 컴패니언 중 한 명은 언제든 주인님께 달려갈 수 있는 위치에 대기하고 있지.

1000617787.english: Oh, right... Stalker, if you join the Companion right now, I'll put you on standby whenever I need to provide close protection for my master. What do you think?
1000617787.korean: 아, 그래... 스토커, 지금이라도 컴패니언에 들어오면 내가 주인님의 밀착 경호를 할 때마다 대기 인원으로 투입시켜 줄게. 어때?

1000617788.english: Pest... Don't make me say it twice... The master is completely...
1000617788.korean: 해충... 두 번 말하게 하지 마... 주인님은 온전히...

1000617789.english: Hehe, when did you two become so close?
1000617789.korean: 후훗, 두 분은 언제 그리 사이가 좋아지신 것이옵니까.

1000617790.english: It's really nice to see. I'm sure the owner will be relieved.
1000617790.korean: 정말로 보기 좋사옵니다. 주인께서도 한시름 놓으실 것이옵니다.

1000617791.english: Pest, why are you so relaxed...? It's annoying...
1000617791.korean: 해충, 왜 그렇게 여유로운 거지...? 기분 나쁘게...

1000617792.english: It was just a remark a little while ago... but it seems like he's really gone crazy.
1000617792.korean: 조금 전엔 그냥 한 말이었는데... 진짜로 돌아버린 모양이네.

1000617793.english: Haha, now that I've let go of the burden on my mind, my actions seem to have become more relaxed.
1000617793.korean: 후후, 마음의 짐을 내려놓으니 절로 행동이 여유로워진 것 같사옵니다.

1000617794.english: Ha. I thought you were quiet lately, but have you lost your mind?
1000617794.korean: 하. 요새 좀 잠잠하다 했더니 정신이 나가버린거였나?

1000617795.english: Stalker, let's go quickly before we lose our minds too.
1000617795.korean: 스토커, 우리까지 머리가 이상해지기 전에 얼른 가자.

1000617796.english: When are you going to tell me what your grand plan is?
1000617796.korean: 너의 그 대단한 계획이 뭔지 대체 언제 실토할거야?

1000617797.english: Even if you saved me, you won't listen to nonsense, right?
1000617797.korean: 네가 아무리 나를 구해줬다고 해도 말도 안되는 건 안 들어줄건데?

1000617800.english: How can it be so lethal?!

1000617801.english: Oh my, what on earth does that mean?

1000617802.english: I heard it all from Hachiko! The old lady took advantage of the innocent Hachiko and Fenrir!
1000617802.korean: 하치코한테 다 들었다구요! 아줌마가 순진한 하치코랑 펜리르를 이용했잖아요!

1000617803.english: Haha... what on earth does that mean...

1000617804.english: Huh, I guess you have at least a modicum of conscience since lightning didn't strike you right away.
1000617804.korean: 흥, 바로 벼락이 떨어지지 않은 걸 보면 최소한의 양심은 있으신가 보네요.

1000617806.english: I'd like to formally protest on behalf of the Companions. Please return the stolen ball.
1000617806.korean: 컴패니언을 대표해서 정식으로 항의하겠습니다. 가로챈 공을 돌려주시죠.

1000617808.english: If Perrault is going to come out like that, I have something to say on behalf of our Fairy.
1000617808.korean: 페로가 그렇게 나오겠다면 저도 저희 페어리를 대표해서 할 말이 있어요.

1000617810.english: Well, aside from those who provide close escorts, companions are the ones who stick closest to their masters, right?
1000617810.korean: 커, 컴패니언은 밀착 호위를 하는 분들을 제외하면 주인님에게 가장 많이 붙어있잖아요?

1000617811.english: Even if you don't achieve such great things, you will have plenty of time to spend with your master, right?
1000617811.korean: 그런 공을 세우지 않아도 충분히 주인님과 함께할 시간이 많을 텐데요?

1000617812.english: That's a different matter. Our companions, at least during security missions, don't engage in personal affairs.
1000617812.korean: 그거랑 그건 다른 문제입니다. 저희 컴패니언은 적어도 경호임무 중에는 사적인 일을 벌이진 않습니다.

1000617814.english: Oh, really? I heard that wolf over there did something incredible...
1000617814.korean: 어머, 그런가요? 그런 것 치고는 그쪽의 늑대분이 굉장한 일을 벌이셨다고 들었는데...

1000617816.english: Oh my, if something happens to you, are you going to say that it was an accident and that there was nothing you could do?
1000617816.korean: 어머머, 만약 주인님께 무슨 일이 생겨도 사고였으니까 어쩔 수 없었다고 할 건가요?

1000617818.english: And even if it was a shallow act, hurting the master... that's something a bodyguard would never even imagine doing.
1000617818.korean: 거기다 아무리 얕다고 해도 주인님께 상처를 입히다니... 경호원으로선 상상조차 할 수 없는 행동인데요?

1000617819.english: But, Fenrir didn't do it on purpose... But...
1000617819.korean: 그, 그래도 펜리르는 일부러 그런게 아니라... 그...

1000617820.english: - When I spoke to them both, Leah was visibly flustered.
1000617820.korean: - 둘을 보고 말을 걸자 레아는 눈에 띄게 당황했다.

1000617822.english: Haha... It's nothing much. Well then, I'll go first because I have something to talk to my younger siblings about.
1000617822.korean: 호호... 별 일 아니랍니다. 그럼 저는 동생들이랑 잠시 이야기할 게 있어서 먼저 가볼게요.

1000617824.english: It's nothing serious. It was just a minor difference of opinion.

1000617827.english: Master, I have a reconnaissance mission, so I will be going now.
1000617827.korean: 주인님, 저는 정찰임무가 있어서 이만 가보겠습니다.

1000617829.english: - Before I could catch him, Perrault turned around and disappeared.
1000617829.korean: - 내가 붙잡을새도 없이 페로는 몸을 돌려 사라졌다.

1000617830.english: - I guess I should ask Daphne what's going on.
1000617830.korean: - 무슨 일인지 다프네한테 한 번 물어봐야겠군.

1000617832.english: - I asked Daphne to call Leah while I checked the organized data.
1000617832.korean: - 다프네에게 내가 정리된 자료를 확인할 동안 레아를 불러달라고 했다.

1000617833.english: - I heard the whole story from Leah, who arrived soon after.

1000617834.english: It was a rare opportunity for our fairy to make a mark, but I was anxious because I was worried that the companions would steal the player.
1000617834.korean: 모처럼 저희 페어리에서 공을 세울 기회였는데 컴패니언 분들에게 선수를 빼앗길까봐 마음이 조급해졌었어요.

1000617837.english: I wish the master would look upon me and my siblings with better regard.
1000617837.korean: 주인님이 저와 제 동생들을 더 좋게 봐주시길 바랬어요.

1000617838.english: Daphne is smart so she can do well on her own, but her other siblings can't, right?
1000617838.korean: 다프네는 똑부러지니까 혼자서도 잘 하지만 다른 동생들은 아니잖아요?

1000617840.english: Aqua is busy keeping an eye on Lise...

1000617842.english: That's right. Master, you have become so much more skilled than before.
1000617842.korean: 맞아요. 주인님께선 전과는 비교도 안될 정도로 능숙해지셨으니까요.

1000617846.english: ...I was talking about how to treat people like Sister Lise, Miss Lilith, and Miss Sowan...
1000617846.korean: ...리제 언니나 리리스 양, 소완 양 같은 분들을 대하시는 법을 말한 거예요...

1000617849.english: - Daphne left the room in a hurry at my joke.
1000617849.korean: - 내 농담에 다프네는 황급히 자리를 떠났다.

1000617850.english: Hehehe. It seems like you've gotten better at it, just like Daphne said.
1000617850.korean: 후훗. 다프네의 말대로 능숙해지긴 하신 것 같아요.

1000617851.english: You even get to play pranks like this...

1000617853.english: I said some harsh things earlier. I got so worked up without even realizing it...
1000617853.korean: 아까는 심한 말을 하기도 했구요. 저도 모르게 열이 올라서...

1000617854.english: But could you please tell Perrault to stop calling me that?
1000617854.korean: 그래도 저, 페로에게 계속 그렇게 부르는 건 그만둬달라고 말씀해주실수 있나요?

1000617855.english: - I stopped talking because of the unusual atmosphere.

1000617856.english: - Even though Leah means no harm to me, my instincts are warning me to get out of here immediately.
1000617856.korean: - 레아가 나에게 해를 끼칠리는 없음에도, 본능이 당장 이 자리를 벗어나라고 경고하고있다.

1000617857.english: - I ran away from Leah and returned to the captain's cabin, calling for Perrault, who had returned after completing his reconnaissance.
1000617857.korean: - 도망치듯 레아에게서 벗어나 함장실로 돌아와 정찰을 마치고 돌아온 페로를 호출했다.

1000617858.english: - Not long after, there was a knock and the captain's cabin door opened.
1000617858.korean: - 얼마지나지 않아 노크 소리가 울리고 함장실 문이 열렸다.

1000617859.english: - Ferro walked over without even greeting me and sat down on the desk.
1000617859.korean: - 인사도 받는둥 마는둥하고 척척 걸어온 페로는 책상 위에 떡하니 걸터앉았다.

1000617860.english: - Then he started complaining about this and that for a long time.
1000617860.korean: - 그리곤 한참동안 이것저것 불평을 늘어놓기 시작했다.

1000617863.english: ......I don't like it. Then the master will be busy with his work and won't focus on me.
1000617863.korean: ......싫습니다. 그러면 주인님은 업무를 보시느라 저에게 집중하지 않으시겠죠.

1000617864.english: - Perrault didn't even snort at my logical rebuttal.
1000617864.korean: - 내 논리적인 반박에 페로는 콧방귀도 뀌지 않았다.

1000617865.english: .........Don't you usually have fun with other people even during work hours?
1000617865.korean: .........평소에는 업무시간에도 다른 분들과 잘만 노시지 않습니까.

1000617866.english: - I didn't know what was going on a little while ago, but now that I've received the report and heard the details of the incident from Daphne, I understand why Perrault was upset.
1000617866.korean: - 조금 전에는 무슨 영문인지 몰랐지만, 보고를 받고 나서 다프네에게 사건의 경위를 듣고 온 지금은 페로가 어째서 마음이 상했는지 알 수 있다.

1000617867.english: - I laughed at the sight of him openly saying, 'I'm upset~'
1000617867.korean: - 대놓고 '나 삐졌어요~' 하는 티를 내는 모습에 웃음이 나왔다.

1000617868.english: - I told him that Leah would come to apologize and continued to comfort Perrault.
1000617868.korean: - 레아가 사과하러 올 거라는 말을 전해주고 계속해서 페로를 달래주었다.

1000617869.english: - I patted my thigh as I watched Perrault, who had suddenly lost his expression but was still maintaining his proud demeanor.
1000617869.korean: - 어느새 표정은 풀려버렸으면서도 꿋꿋히 도도한 태도를 유지하는 페로를 보며 내 허벅지를 툭툭 쳤다.

1000617870.english: ...If that's what the master says, then I guess there's nothing I can do.
1000617870.korean: ...주인님이 그렇게 말씀하신다면 어, 어쩔 수 없겠네요.

1000617871.english: - The moment Perrault carefully sat down on my lap, the captain's cabin door flew open.
1000617871.korean: - 페로가 조심스럽게 내 무릎에 앉으려는 순간 함장실 문이 벌컥 열렸다.

1000617872.english: Master, master! I'm sorry about last time...

1000617873.english: So this time I'll treat you to some more delicious meat. Let's go together, okay?
1000617873.korean: 그러니까 이번에는 더 맛있는 고기 먹게 해줄게. 같이 가자, 응?

1000617874.english: Master! Can't Hachiko come with us?

1000617876.english: Were you playing with your master alone?

1000617877.english: - The two of them grabbed each of my legs and hung on, so Perrault was pushed away in an instant.
1000617877.korean: - 둘이 내 다리를 한쪽씩 잡고 매달리는 바람에 페로는 순식간에 밀려나고 말았다.

1000617880.english: Master, I heard last time that Perrault also wants to be petted a lot by the master!
1000617880.korean: 주인님, 저번에 들었는데 페로도 주인님이 많이 쓰다듬어 줬으면 좋겠대요!

1000617883.english: I wish you would do the cheeks and chin like this.

1000617884.english: - I glanced at Perrault while Fenrir was explaining with gestures.
1000617884.korean: - 손짓까지 섞어가며 설명하는 펜리르를 보다 슬쩍 페로에게 시선을 주었다.

1000617885.english: - After hesitating for a while with a blush on his face, Perrault knelt down between Fenrir and Hachiko.
1000617885.korean: - 한동안 얼굴을 붉히며 주저하던 페로는 펜리르와 하치코 사이에 다소곳하게 무릎을 꿇고 앉았다.

1000617886.english: - He brought his hand to her flushed cheek and gently stroked it.
1000617886.korean: - 발그레한 볼에 손을 가져가 살짝 쓰다듬었다.

1000617888.english: - A shocking sound escaped from Perrault's mouth as he closed his eyes tightly.
1000617888.korean: - 지그시 눈을 감은 페로의 입에서 충격적인 소리가 새어나왔다.

1000617890.english: This, this is something I didn't even know... That...

1000617895.english: - In the end, I had to take turns stroking the three of them, who were clinging to each other and refusing to leave, until late at night.
1000617895.korean: - 결국 나는 몸을 꼭 붙이고 떨어지지 않으려하는 셋을 밤이 깊어질 때까지 번갈아가며 쓰다듬어 주어야 했다.

1000617896.english: - The three of them returned to their rooms, laughing at each other's hair, which was disheveled from the wind that had worn away my palm.
1000617896.korean: - 셋은 내가 손바닥이 닳아 없어지기 직전까지 쓰다듬어 준 바람에 산발이 된 서로의 머리카락을 보고 웃으며 방으로 돌아갔다.

1000617898.english: My head hurts. What kind of dream was that? I can’t focus. It feels like I can’t escape from that dream. The Doctor’s report drifts into my ears as faintly as if I were still dreaming.
1000617898.korean: - 머리가 아프다 무슨 꿈이었지? 집중할 수가 없다. 꿈에서 빠져나올 수가 없는 기분이다.&n닥터의 보고가 꿈에서 듣는 것처럼 아련하게 들린다.

1000617901.english: … So, it’s not that your head is infected by the Metal Parasites. Any creature infected by them must have an entry port somewhere. But there were no such ports anywhere on your body.
1000617901.korean: … 그러니까 오빠 머리는 철충에 감염된 게 아냐. 철충에 감염된 개체들은 무조건&n들어간 구멍이 생길 수 밖에 없어. 하지만 오빠 몸 어디에도 철충이 들어간 구멍이 없었거든.

1000617902.english: Besides, for a Metal Parasite to infect in the first place, the host—the base—needs to be of a certain minimum size. Anything smaller than the Pupp Head model? Out!
1000617902.korean: 게다가 애초에 철충이 기생을 하려면 기본적으로 몸, 그러니까 베이스가 되는 크기가&n있어야 한단 말야. 펍 헤드 모델 이하론 아웃!

1000617903.english: And your head is way smaller than a Pupp Head. So even though it looked similar to a Metal Parasite infection from the outside, there’s no way they invaded and eroded it.
1000617903.korean: 오빠 머리가 펍 헤드보다 훨씬 작잖아. 오빠 머리는 외형으론 철충 감염과 비슷하게&n보였지만 절대로 철충이 침입해서 침식되는 게 아니란 거지.

1000617905.english: Heheh. Nah. Thanks to this I got to examine every corner of your body… ah, no, I mean—anyway, it was fun! This sort of thing hardly ever happens.
1000617905.korean: 헤헷. 아냐. 덕분에 오빠의 몸을 구석구석… 아, 아니지. 어쨌든 재미있었으니까.&n이런 일은 거의 없거든.

1000617906.english: Then what about the Commander’s body…

1000617907.english: I’ve been considering several hypotheses, but… it’s not that the brain itself was corroded. It’s more like the brain was encased and eroded by Metal Parasite matter, like a skull surrounding it…
1000617907.korean: 여러 가설들을 생각해 보고 있긴 한데… 뇌 자체가 침식된 것도 아니고 철충 성분이&n뇌를 두개골처럼 감싸면서 침식되는 형태거든…

1000617908.english: Ah! And I forgot to mention this last time… your head was actually openable. It had a hatch fitted exactly to the size of your brain, you could say.
1000617908.korean: 아! 그리고 저번에 이야기하는 걸 깜빡했는데… 오빠 머리 개폐식이었어.&n딱 뇌 크기로 문이 달렸다고나 할까?

1000617909.english: Metal Parasites make holes, not doors. So… it doesn’t really feel like something they’d do. This erosion feels… more human.
1000617909.korean: 철충들은 문을 만드는 것 보단 구멍을 만드니까. 뭔가… 철충적이진 않지.&n오히려 이 침식은 인간적인 느낌인걸?

1000617911.english: I’m still analyzing that, so you’ll have to wait a bit. It didn’t seem man-made either. The way the hatch opened wasn’t a mechanism a human hand could operate. Anyway—Sis Marie? I have something to ask you…
1000617911.korean: 아직 분석 중이니까 그건 좀 기다려줘. 인간이 만든 것 같지도 않았어. 문이 열리는 방식이&n인간의 손으로 여는 타입이 아니었거든. 그것보다 마리 언니? 물어볼 게 있는데...

1000617912.english: Sis Marie, you didn’t notice anything strange with Big Brother…
1000617912.korean: 마리 언니는 아무렇지도 않았잖아. 사령관 오빠한테…

1000617913.english: Hm? Strange? What do you mean?

1000617914.english: Well, both Sis Labiata and Sis Marie have seen humans in the past, right? But Sis Labiata noticed that Big Brother had a Metal Parasite shell attached… while you didn’t.
1000617914.korean: 아니. 라비아타 언니건 마리 언니건 옛날에 인간을 본 건 마찬가지잖아. 그런데 라비아타 언니는&n오빠한테 철충 껍데기가 붙은 걸 눈치챘었는데… 마리 언니는 몰랐단 말이지…

1000617915.english: Ah… I did hear that Sister Labiata was sensitive about it. She wouldn’t have known about Bermuda’s research, so that makes sense.
1000617915.korean: 아… 라비아타 통령이 민감하게 군 건 들었다. 통령은 버뮤다의 연구에 대해 몰랐을 테니 당연한 거겠지.

1000617916.english: Bermuda’s research? What are you talking about?
1000617916.korean: 버뮤다의 연구? 그건 또 무슨 말이야?

1000617917.english: The researchers of Bermuda have been conducting continuous studies on cybernetics. Honestly, when I first saw it… I assumed your head was obviously the result of a cybernetic enhancement. I thought the memory issues were just a side effect.
1000617917.korean: 버뮤다의 연구원들은 사이버네틱스에 관한 연구를 지속적으로 해왔다. 난 사실 처음 봤을 때…&n각하의 머리가 당연히 사이버네틱스의 결과물이라고 생각했다. 기억은 그 부작용이라고 생각했고.

1000617918.english: Wait… so… huh… now that you mention it…

1000617920.english: There are plenty of machines that resemble Metal Parasites. Just look at the Underwatchers we fought in the past, right?
1000617920.korean: 철충과 비슷한 외양의 기계는 많다. 당장 과거에 싸웠던 언더와쳐만 봐도 그렇지 않나?

1000617921.english: … So what you mean, Sis Marie, is that Sis Labiata and we all… mistook Big Brother’s head for a Metal Parasite infection and caused a fuss?
1000617921.korean: … 마리 언니 말은… 라비아타 언니랑 우리가… 오빠 머리를 철충 감염으로 착각해서 난리를 쳤단 거야?

1000617922.english: … Not exactly. Then how would you explain the actual Metal Parasite material, or the fact that the skull really was being eroded?
1000617922.korean: … 아냐. 그러면 실제로 그 철충 금속 소재나 실제로 두개골이 침식되고 있었다는 건&n어떻게 설명할 거야?

1000617923.english: Why do you assume Black River couldn’t use Metal Parasite materials? During the course of that war, there’s no way Black River didn’t capture at least one Metal Parasite.
1000617923.korean: 왜 블랙리버가 철충의 소재를 쓰지 못한다고 생각하는 거지? 그 전쟁의 기간 동안&n블랙리버가 철충 한 마리를 포획하지 못했을 리가 없지 않나.

1000617924.english: Even the Underwatchers look like they incorporated Metal Parasite technology… and that erosion method… it’s not beyond human capability either.
1000617924.korean: 언더와쳐만 봐도 철충 기술이 적용된 걸로 보인다만… 침식이라는 방식도…&n인간이 못 쓸 방식은 아니지.

1000617925.english: True, but… hmm… ugh, my head’s getting all tangled. Hm…
1000617925.korean: 그렇긴 한데… 음… 아우 머리가 복잡하네? 음…

1000617926.english: … I suppose that’s another way of looking at it. A form of infection similar to the Metal Parasites… I really thought it could only have been their doing.
1000617926.korean: … 그렇게 생각할 수도 있겠네요. 철충과 유사한 형태의 감염이라… 전 철충이 한 짓으로만&n생각했어요.

1000617927.english: I may really have committed a terrible mistake.
1000617927.korean: 전 정말 큰 잘못을 저질렀을 수도 있겠군요.

1000617928.english: Don’t be so disheartened. Sis just… hates the Metal Parasites that much.
1000617928.korean: 그렇게 상심하지마. 언니야 뭐… 철충을 워낙 싫어하니까.

1000617929.english: And besides, as for Big Brother’s infection, there wasn’t absolute certainty that it wasn’t them. That kind of certainty… only Sis Marie, who loves Big Brother, would have…
1000617929.korean: 게다가 오빠 감염에 대해서도 절대로 철충은 아니다라는 확신도 없고 그런 확신은&n오빠를 사랑하는 마리 언니 정도나…

1000617931.english: That’s what Brownie and Emily were saying, you know? Back at the armory…

1000617933.english: … Why does that Secret Point never disappear… no, more importantly…
1000617933.korean: - … 그 시크릿 포인트는 어째서 사라지지 않는 걸까… 아니다. 그것보다…

1000617934.english: Well… we still don’t know for sure. But the matter’s been settled now anyway. Whether it was the work of the Metal Parasites… or Black River, or some other corporation…
1000617934.korean: 뭐… 아직은 모르는 거지. 이젠 다 해결된 일이기도 하고… 철충이 한 짓일지…&n블랙리버나 다른 기업이 한 짓인지…

1000617935.english: It’s just… humans have been extinct for so long, I never thought about it being a corporation’s doing.
1000617935.korean: 인간님들이 멸망한지 너무 오래돼서… 기업 쪽으론 생각을 못했군요.

1000617936.english: Anyway, Sis Labiata… you won’t go back into that confinement cell again, right? It’s all been resolved now, hasn’t it? Hm?
1000617936.korean: 됐어. 됐어. 어쨌든 라비아타 언니… 이젠 다시 그 감금실에 안 들어갈 거지?&n다 해결된 일이잖아. 응?

1000617937.english: Sis Marie, why do you suddenly look so strict, dignified, and serious?
1000617937.korean: 마리 언니 갑자기 왜 엄격하고 근엄한데다 진지한 얼굴인데?

1000617938.english: Even if she’s another Commander type Bioroid, the fact remains that she tried to attack His Excellency…
1000617938.korean: 아무리 통령이라도 각하를 공격하려 한 일에 대해선…

1000617940.english: No, Captain Marie is right. Even if the misunderstanding’s been cleared up… punishment must still be given.
1000617940.korean: 아니에요. 마리 대장의 말이 맞아요. 오해를 풀었다고 해도… 벌은 받아야 합니다.

1000617941.english: It’s not that I have personal feelings about this. But if we just let it go… discipline among the other subordinates will collapse.
1000617941.korean: 나도 감정이 있는 건 아니다. 하지만, 이 일을 그냥 넘어간다면… 부하들에게 기강이 서지 않을 거다.

1000617942.english: But Sis Labiata is absolutely necessary to Big Brother. If she’s punished… that wouldn’t be good, right? Big Brother?! You’ll forgive Sis Labiata, won’t you?
1000617942.korean: 하지만, 라비아타 언니는 사령관 오빠에게 꼭 필요해. 벌을 받거나 하면… 그렇지? 오빠?!&n응? 라비아타 언니를 용서해 줄 거지?

1000617943.english: Labiata’s intellect and combat ability are a great asset to us. On top of that, she has led the Bioroids for a long time.
1000617943.korean: - 라비아타의 지성과 전투력은 우리에게 큰 도움을 주니까. 게다가 그녀는 오랜 기간&n바이오로이드를 이끌어 왔다.

1000617945.english: In that case, it’s simple. Let’s proceed like this, Commander, Your Excellency.
1000617945.korean: 그렇다면 간단하군. 이렇게 하도록 하지요. 사령관 각하.

1000617946.english: As Labiata’s punishment, she will first receive imprisonment… confined to the holding cell. However, she will still be allowed to come out and fight in battles. What do you think?
1000617946.korean: 라비아타에게 주는 벌은 일단은 금고형으로… 감금실에 가두어 두는 걸로 하겠습니다.&n하지만, 전투에는 나와서 돕는 걸로… 어떻습니까?

1000617948.english: I’ll do as Captain Marie says. And… while I’m inside, I’ll reflect on my actions. Until the time comes when my sin is considered repaid…
1000617948.korean: 마리 대장의 말대로 할게요. 그리고… 안에 있는 동안 반성하도록 하겠습니다.&n제 죄가 갚아졌다고 할 때까지…

1000617949.english: Imprisonment is the lightest of punishments. Your Excellency, let’s go with that. In exchange, when battle begins, she’ll come out to aid in combat.
1000617949.korean: 금고형은 가장 가벼운 형벌입니다. 각하, 그걸로 하시죠. 그 대신 전투가 시작되면&n나와서 전투를 돕는 걸로...

1000617952.english: … I’ll have a talk with the Doctor. And…

1000617953.english: From here on, please take care of me. Until I’ve fully paid for my sins… I’ll serve from within the holding cell. Well then… I’ll be going…
